title: Ethos verification config
description: Pinned verification behavior. verification_config_sha256 in the report = sha256 over c14n of this object, so two reports are comparable only under the same config hash. v1 match methods are deliberately literal: exact text, whitespace-normalized text, table cell lookup, bbox containment, presence. Nothing fuzzy, nothing semantic.

claim_kinds.description: Claim kinds this run supports; kinds in the input but not here are reported under unsupported_claim_kinds.

text_normalization.description: 'collapse_whitespace': normalize line endings, trim, and collapse runs of ASCII whitespace to a single ASCII space. The ONLY normalization in v1; no Unicode normalization (it would alter extraction fidelity).

bbox_containment_tolerance_q.description: Tolerance in quanta when checking citation bbox containment against evidence bbox. Integer quanta keep the config float-free.

require_fingerprint_match.description: When true and the grounding source declares a fingerprint, citations carrying a different fingerprint mark the report stale. When the source declares none, a capability_limited warning is emitted instead.

include_text.description: Echo found evidence text into the report.

include_crops.description: Crop-aware L2 evidence (Milestone D; requires crop_support capability).
